offer.purpose: Yerevan Sac offers an authentic Armenian and Georgian dining experience in Carmichael, specializing in traditional grilled meats, handmade khinkali, and Mediterranean-inspired cuisine for the Greater Sacramento community.
offer.uniqueValueProp: The only destination in the Sacramento area offering a refined fusion of Armenian and Georgian culinary traditions with handmade specialties and a full cocktail bar.
offer.targetAudience: Local residents and food enthusiasts looking for unique Mediterranean and Caucasian dining experiences, group celebrations, and professional catering.

defaultOffer.text: Join Us for Authentic Armenian-Georgian Dining - Book Your Table Today!
defaultOffer.fallbackText: Experience the Flavors of Yerevan Sac

companyInfo.name: Yerevan Sac
companyInfo.about: Yerevan Sac is a premier dining destination in Carmichael, CA, dedicated to the rich culinary heritage of Armenia and Georgia. We pride ourselves on using fresh ingredients to create handmade khinkali, perfectly seasoned kebabs, traditional Caucasian soups and stews, and a welcoming atmosphere for families and large groups.
companyInfo.napSource: Reconciled from live site (yerevansac.com) on 2026-05-13. Prior research had 6240 Fair Oaks Blvd / 11AM open hours which conflicted with public-facing data; live website is the source of truth.
